name: BcbsaIdsInterPlnBillDtlExtr

text.value:
@concat(
  'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ',
  pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging,
  '.TRANS_TMP_BcbsaIdsInterPlnBillDtlExtr ',
  'WITH cte1 AS (\n',
  '  SELECT ',
  'BILL_DTL_SRL_NO,\n',
  'HOME_PLN_MBR_ID,\n',
  'CONSIS_MBR_ID,\n',
  'ITS_SUB_ID,\n',
  'CBF_SETL_STRT_DT,\n',
  'CBF_SETL_BILL_END_DT,\n',
  'NDW_HOME_PLN_ID,\n',
  'HOME_CORP_PLN_CD,\n',
  'CTL_PLN_CD,\n',
  'NDW_HOST_PLN_ID,\n',
  'HOST_CORP_PLN_CD,\n',
  'LOCAL_PLN_CD,\n',
  'LOCAL_PLN_STATN_CD,\n',
  'LOCAL_PLN_CFA_ACCT_CD,\n',
  'PRCS_SITE_CTL_STATN_CD,\n',
  'CTL_PLN_CFA_ACCT_CD,\n',
  'BTCH_CRT_DT,\n',
  'TRANS_IN,\n',
  'STTUS_CD,\n',
  'BILL_DTL_POSTING_DT,\n',
  'EDIT_DT,\n',
  'ERR_CD_1,\n',
  'ERR_CD_2,\n',
  'ERR_CD_3,\n',
  'ERR_CD_4,\n',
  'ERR_CD_5,\n',
  'BILL_DTL_EXTR_STTUS_CD,\n',
  'CAP_BULK_SETL_RATE_AMT,\n',
  'XREF_CBF_SCCF_SRL_NO,\n',
  'HOME_AUTH_DENIAL_DT,\n',
  'CFA_DFLT_PAYMT_DT,\n',
  'CFA_DISP_DT,\n',
  'CFA_PRCS_DT,\n',
  'TYP_OF_CFA_RMBRMT,\n',
  'TYP_OF_CFA_TRANS,\n',
  'BTCH_STTUS_CD,\n',
  'INCUR_PERD_STRT_DT,\n',
  'INCUR_PERD_END_DT,\n',
  'MSRMNT_PERD_STRT_DT,\n',
  'MSRMNT_PERD_END_DT,\n',
  'MBR_LVL_CHRG_AMT,\n',
  'VAL_BASED_PGM_CD,\n',
  'PROV_GRP_NM,\n',
  'ATTRBTN_PROV_PAYMT_TYP_CD,\n',
  'SETL_DT,\n',
  'VAL_BASED_PGM_PAYMT_TYP_CD,\n',
  'EPSD_TYP_CD,\n',
  'VRNC_ACCT_ID,\n',
  'ACES_FEE_ADJ_AMT,\n',
  'CASE WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING(ATTRBTN_PGM_CD,1,2)) = ''MH'' THEN ''PCM'' ELSE ATTRBTN_PGM_CD END AS ATTRBTN_PGM_CD,\n',
  'GRP_ID,\n',
  'ATTRBTN_BCBS_PROV_NO,\n',
  'ATTRBTN_NPI_PROV_NO,\n',
  'VAL_BASED_PGM_ID,\n',
  'ATTRBTN_PROV_PGM_NM,\n',
  'MMI_ID_MSTR_MBR_INDX,\n',
  'BOID_BUS_OWNER_ID,\n',
  'ORIG_ITS_SCCF_SRL_NO,\n',
  'ORIG_BILL_DTL_SRL_NO,\n',
  'ELIG_STRT_DT__MBR,\n',
  'ELIG_END_DT__MBR,\n',
  'DSPTD_RCRD_IN,\n',
  'HOME_PLN_DSPT_ACTN_CD,\n',
  'CMNT_TX,\n',
  'HOST_PLN_DSPT_ACTN_CD,\n',
  'LOCAL_PLN_CTL_NO,\n',
  'PRCS_SITE_CTL_NO,\n',
  'BILL_DTL_RCRD_TYP_CD,\n',
  'FLR\n',
  '  FROM ',
  pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging,
  '.TMP_BcbsaIdsInterPlnBillDtlExtr\n',
  ')\n',
  'SELECT * INTO ',
  pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging,
  '.TRANS_TMP_BcbsaIdsInterPlnBillDtlExtr FROM cte1'
)

Description:
Â© Copyright 2015 Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas City

Processing:
                    Extracts data from BCBSA BDF file into a Dataset
